summary: SyncState repository implementation with Get and Upsert methods for tracking per-channel sync progress
side_effects: direct SQL queries against sync_state table
notes: Implements SyncStateRepository interface (storage.go:54-57). Get() returns nil for not-found (no error). Upsert() uses SQLite ON CONFLICT for idempotent updates. Checkpoint field is flexible string type to support etag, version strings, or other sync markers. Part of repository pattern family: channels.go, messages.go, message_summaries.go, all embedded in sqliteStore.
